programme.title: 1988. O planeta Mãe das Trevas se aproxima da Terra e Uchūnin Dell-Star finalmente quer a sua vingança. O centro terremoto é na mina em que esconde o Deus Jirai, então a família Yamashi vai até lá para saber o que aconteceu e encontra Pako. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura

programme.title: 1988. Para exterminar Pako, o planeta das trevas se aproxima da Terra pouco a pouco e, nesse exato momento na mina, inicia-se uma magnífica batalha entre jiraya e seu velho inimigo Dell-Star. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura

programme.desc: Jiraya - O incrível Ninja - T01E49

programme.title: 1988. Uma motoqueira com jaqueta vermelha passa por Issamu durante uma perseguição com Gatezon. A motoqueira em questão é Yuko Midorikawa. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.sub-title: A Mulher Que Esteve em Kaima

programme.title: 1988. Maribaron obteve a chave para o Mundo Kaima. Issamu procura desesperadamente por Yuko, que tinha uma das peças que formava tal chave. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.sub-title: O Céu do Amor e da Esperança
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E32

programme.title: 1988. O General Jark anuncia uma nova operação: a criação da Crisislândia, a primeira base terrestre de Crisis. O alvo é a Grande Ponte Setoo, na ilha de Shikoku. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E33

programme.title: 1988. E mais uma vez o Império Crisis coloca a pequena ilha de Shikoku como alvo principal. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E34

programme.title: 1988. Crisis iniciou uma operação que consiste na invasão de sistemas, e agora o sistema da polícia está em suas mãos. programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E37

programme.title: 1988. O primeiro grupo de imigrantes de Kaima finalmente chega à Terra. Porém, a tripulação morre por causa do clima inabitável para quem vem de Kaima. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E38

programme.title: 1988. Uma risada sinistra ecoa em um bloco de condomínios pacífico. Assim que Issamu adentra o condomínio fantasma, o Guerreiro Kaima Gainajagran surge diante dele e desafia RX. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa

Para salvar a sua Aldeia, Naruto e seus amigos partem para impedir essa ameaça. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: Will of Fire
programme.desc: 2009. Quatro shinobi Kekkei Genkai que guardavam as Aldeias Ocultas da Nuvem, Pedra, Névoa e Areia desaparecem sem deixar vestígios. Enquanto isso, Naruto e os seus amigos descobrem más notícias: Kakashi deixou a vila. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: The Lost Tower
programme.desc: 2010. O Ninja Patife Mukade está prestes a ser capturado por Naruto, quando ele invoca o poder de um antigo canal subterrâneo de chakra. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: Blood Prison
programme.desc: 2011. Começa a batalha de Naruto para recuperar a sua honra! Naruto é condenado por um crime grave que não cometeu e é enviado para a prisão inescapável, o Castelo Hozuki. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Meu Amigo - T02E71
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde a consciência e é tomado por impulsos destrutivos. Os clones de Sai e Yamato testemunham uma batalha horrível entre Orochimaru e Naruto. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Sob O Céu Estrelado - T02E74

programme.title: 2000. Luffy dá de cara com o Capitão Smoker e não consegue manter a discrição. Assim, Buggy consegue marcá-lo. Em outra parte da cidade, Zoro se arrisca contra uma terrível maldição. programme.desc: Death Note - T01E02

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E05

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E07

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E08

programme.title: 2007. Os assassinatos continuam, e L começa a suspeitar do comportamento perfeito de Light que então decide investigar por conta própria. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E09

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E10

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E11

programme.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

programme.desc: Victor is new to Montreal and attempts to make friends with the wheelchair-bound Spencer and the cat-loving Louise, but everybody is on edge with a serial killer terrorizing the neighborhood. Starring Jay Baruchel, Scott Speedman, Emily Hampshire.

programme.title: A Thousand and One
programme.desc: Unapologetic and free-spirited Inez kidnaps her 6-year-old son, Terry, from the foster care system. They set out to reclaim their sense of home, identity and stability in a rapidly changing New York City. Starring Teyana Taylor, Aaron Kingsley Adetola, Aven Courtney.

programme.title: Incendies

programme.title: Paseo
programme.desc: A woman becomes displaced and alienated by her surroundings while traveling through Spain. She begins to lose control of her emotional and psychological self as she explores another possible life. Starring Sarah Gadon, Peter Mooney, Alejandro Alvarez Cadilla.

programme.title: Racetime
programme.desc: After losing a rigged sled race, Frankie challenges newcomer Zac to one last showdown. With the stakes higher than ever, Zac will stop at nothing to win the race. Starring Lucinda Davis, Noel Fisher, Angela Galuppo.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. A battle of wills soon breaks out as McGregor hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent. Starring James Corden, Fayssal Bazzi, Domhnall Gleeson.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2: The Runaway
programme.desc: Venturing out of the garden, Peter finds himself in a world where his mischief is appreciated. However, when his makeshift family risks everything to come looking for him, Peter must figure out what kind of bunny he wants to be. Starring James Corden, Rose Byrne, Domhnall Gleeson.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality

programme.desc: An idle rich womans (Shelley Long) husband (Craig T. Nelson) challenges her to lead their daughters troop of campers. Starring Shelley Long, Craig T. Nelson, Betty Thomas.

programme.desc: A world of adventure is unleashed on siblings Peter and Judy when they find a jungle-themed game called Jumanji in the attic. Starring Robin Williams, Jonathan Hyde, Kirsten Dunst.

programme.desc: Four teens embark on the adventure of a lifetime when a video game magically transports them to the jungle and transforms them into adults. Starring Dwayne Johnson, Kevin Hart, Jack Black.

programme.desc: Learn whats behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQs Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Alabama State University
programme.desc: Alabama State University.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Bethune-Cookman University
programme.desc: Featuring Bethune-Cookman University.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - HBCU All Star Battle of the Bands
programme.desc: Aspire TVs 6 Minutes to Glory brings six HBCU marching bands to the historic Battle of the Bands at Mercedes Benz Stadium in Atlanta; after months of practice and preparation, these performers are determined to leave their legacy on the field.

programme.title: From This Day Forward
programme.desc: Patrice (Essence Atkins) and Corrine (Vanessa Simmons), two sexy and confident women in great relationships, have to learn tough lessons about trust and fidelity to make their love last.

programme.title: Really Love
programme.desc: A rising Black painter tries to break into the competitive art world while balancing an unexpected romance with an ambitious law student.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Class Reunion
programme.desc: Michael is reluctant to attend his high-school reunion until a former rival challenges him to a dance-off.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - The Fellowship of the Baby
programme.desc: Michael tells Jr. that Jr., Jr. is a magic baby that will increase his intelligence every time he holds him.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Poker Face
programme.desc: Michael tells Jr. to spend some time away from Vanessa and the baby, but his advice backfires when Jr. invites Jay to the all-male poker game.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - The Proposal
programme.desc: A karaoke competition between Michael and Jay and numerous other interruptions prevent Jr. from finally proposing to Vanessa.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Ramblin Mann
programme.desc: The Manns cousin Barry comes for a visit and goes undercover to help break up a crime ring, rival detectives compete with Hobbs and Mann to solve the cold case.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Mann in Charge
programme.desc: When his parents go out of town, DJ rents a room out to an elderly party animal; Hobbs and the Lieutenant pretend to be in a relationship when she tries to outshine her recently-engaged sister.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Come On, Mann!
programme.desc: Poppa Bo comes to visit and teaches Tasha to fight, getting her into trouble at school and home; when Daniel accidentally leaks private information to the whole police precinct, the Lieutenant comes under fire.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Mann Shark
programme.desc: The Manns give Terri money for her winning business idea, but her management style is less successful; A young man shows up at the precinct, claiming to be Hobbs son.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Dead Mann Walking
programme.desc: The family plays into Daniels health hysteria in order to get him to visit his doctor. Lieutenant Tate and Hobbs use a social media expert to help them solve a string of thefts.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Dope Mann
programme.desc: When drugs are found at Tonis school, everyone sees DJ as a suspect. Hobbs and Mann go undercover at the school to catch the criminal.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - A Womans Mann
programme.desc: Toni takes DJ and Terri to a robotics competition but she accidentally ruins Terris chances at victory; Daniel does a horrible job watching the kids and the house on his own.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Mann, Shut Yo Mouth
programme.desc: Struggling to solve a tough case, an exhausted Daniel falls asleep and wakes up in a 70s blaxploitation cop show.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Detention Peddler
programme.desc: A daunting interview for the position of vice principal derails Steves confidence; Cedric pops the question to Lovita.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Party of Five
